{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Regional Sales Manager",
  "description": "Virtutis Solaris Limited, a sister company of Mojec International Limited, is a leading renewable energy solutions provider committed to delivering clean, reliable, cost-effective, and sustainable electricity across Nigeria. We empower homes, businesses, and communities through innovative energy solutions, including Solar Home Systems (SHS), Mini-Grids, Commercial &amp; Industrial (C&amp;I) Solar Solutions, and Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS).&nbsp;

As part of our continued expansion, we are seeking passionate, innovative, and results-driven professionals to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Regional Sales Manager&nbsp; &ndash; Commercial &amp; Industrial (C&amp;I) Solutions

Job Locations: Abuja and Lagos
Reports To: Head, Business Development &amp; Sales

Job Summary


	The Regional Sales Representative will be responsible for driving business growth by identifying new business opportunities, developing strategic client relationships, and delivering innovative renewable energy solutions to commercial and industrial customers.
	The role requires a highly motivated sales professional capable of managing the entire sales cycle from lead generation through project execution.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities within the commercial and industrial market.
	Prospect and engage corporate organizations, manufacturing companies, educational institutions, healthcare facilities, hospitality businesses, real estate developers, financial institutions, and government agencies.
	Conduct customer needs assessments and recommend suitable renewable energy solutions.
	Prepare technical and commercial proposals in collaboration with the engineering team.
	Present renewable energy solutions to prospective clients.
	Negotiate commercial terms and successfully close sales opportunities.
	Develop and manage a healthy sales pipeline to achieve monthly and annual revenue targets.
	Build and maintain long-term customer relationships and provide excellent after-sales support.
	Maintain accurate customer information using CRM platforms.
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and emerging technologies within the renewable energy sector.
	Represent the Company at exhibitions, industry events, and business development meetings.
	Submit periodic sales forecasts, activity reports, and market intelligence to Management.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in&nbsp;Engineering, Business Administration, Marketing, Economics, or a related discipline.
	3&ndash;5 years of experience in business development or B2B sales, preferably within the renewable energy, power, engineering, or infrastructure sectors.
	Proven ability to sell high-value commercial solutions and consistently achieve sales targets.
	Good understanding of Solar PV systems, Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS), hybrid energy solutions, and Nigeria&#39;s electricity market.
	Strong negotiation, presentation, and relationship management skills.
	Financial and commercial acumen with the ability to understand project economics and return-on-investment analyses.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications and CRM software.
	Valid driver&#39;s licence and willingness to travel within assigned territories.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary
	Attractive performance-based incentives
	Health Insurance (HMO)
	Pension Scheme
	Continuous learning and professional development opportunities
	Career growth within a rapidly expanding renewable energy company
	Supportive and collaborative work environment
	Official vehicle or transportation support (role/performance dependent)


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application &nbsp;to: hr@mojec.com and copy adewumi@mojec.com using &quot;Application for Regional Sales Manager &ndash; [Lagos/Abuja]&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: Candidates should include ther current renumeration in the email body.",

Regional Sales Manager Job at Virtutis Solaris Limited




        
    

        
        Virtutis Solaris Limited, a sister company of Mojec International Limited, is a leading renewable energy solutions provider committed to delivering clean, reliable, cost-effective, and sustainable electricity across Nigeria. We empower homes, businesses, and communities through innovative energy solutions, including Solar Home Systems (SHS), Mini-Grids, Commercial & Industrial (C&I) Solar Solutions, and Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS). 

As part of our continued expansion, we are seeking passionate, innovative, and results-driven professionals to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Regional Sales Manager  – Commercial & Industrial (C&I) Solutions
     

            
    



Job Locations: Abuja and Lagos
Reports To: Head, Business Development & Sales

Job Summary


	The Regional Sales Representative will be responsible for driving business growth by identifying new business opportunities, developing strategic client relationships, and delivering innovative renewable energy solutions to commercial and industrial customers.
	The role requires a highly motivated sales professional capable of managing the entire sales cycle from lead generation through project execution.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities within the commercial and industrial market.
	Prospect and engage corporate organizations, manufacturing companies, educational institutions, healthcare facilities, hospitality businesses, real estate developers, financial institutions, and government agencies.
	Conduct customer needs assessments and recommend suitable renewable energy solutions.
	Prepare technical and commercial proposals in collaboration with the engineering team.
	Present renewable energy solutions to prospective clients.
	Negotiate commercial terms and successfully close sales opportunities.
	Develop and manage a healthy sales pipeline to achieve monthly and annual revenue targets.
	Build and maintain long-term customer relationships and provide excellent after-sales support.
	Maintain accurate customer information using CRM platforms.
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and emerging technologies within the renewable energy sector.
	Represent the Company at exhibitions, industry events, and business development meetings.
	Submit periodic sales forecasts, activity reports, and market intelligence to Management.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor's Degree in Engineering, Business Administration, Marketing, Economics, or a related discipline.
	3–5 years of experience in business development or B2B sales, preferably within the renewable energy, power, engineering, or infrastructure sectors.
	Proven ability to sell high-value commercial solutions and consistently achieve sales targets.
	Good understanding of Solar PV systems, Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS), hybrid energy solutions, and Nigeria's electricity market.
	Strong negotiation, presentation, and relationship management skills.
	Financial and commercial acumen with the ability to understand project economics and return-on-investment analyses.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications and CRM software.
	Valid driver's licence and willingness to travel within assigned territories.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary
	Attractive performance-based incentives
	Health Insurance (HMO)
	Pension Scheme
	Continuous learning and professional development opportunities
	Career growth within a rapidly expanding renewable energy company
	Supportive and collaborative work environment
	Official vehicle or transportation support (role/performance dependent)


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application  to: [email protected] and copy [email protected] using "Application for Regional Sales Manager – [Lagos/Abuja]" as the subject of the email.

Note: Candidates should include ther current renumeration in the email body.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Architect",
  "description": "Jodazen Integrated Services - Our client is a dynamic and fast-growing organisation operating across the real estate sector.

They are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;&nbsp;Architect
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;

Job Overview


	We are seeking a smart and detail-oriented&nbsp;architect.
	The architect will support the design and execution of residential, commercial, and mixed-use developments.
	We require a highly competent, IT-savvy professional who combines strong design thinking with modern digital workflow capabilities.


Key Responsibilities
Design &amp; Project Development:


	Lead architectural design from concept development through construction documentation.
	Develop innovative, functional, and aesthetically compelling architectural solutions.
	Prepare detailed architectural drawings, presentations, renderings, and design reports.
	Translate client requirements into practical and buildable design solutions.
	Ensure designs align with project budgets, timelines, regulatory requirements, and sustainability objectives.


Technical Coordination:


	Coordinate closely with structural, mechanical, electrical, and civil engineers.
	Review engineering drawings to ensure multidisciplinary coordination.
	Resolve design conflicts before construction begins.
	Conduct constructability reviews to improve efficiency and reduce project risks.


Project Delivery:


	Provide architectural leadership throughout the construction lifecycle.
	Conduct regular site inspections to ensure work complies with approved drawings and specifications.
	Respond promptly to RFIs (Requests for Information), design clarifications, and site challenges.
	Review contractor shop drawings, material samples, and technical submissions.
	Participate in project meetings and provide design guidance to project teams.


Regulatory Compliance:


	Prepare and submit documentation required for planning approvals and statutory permits.
	Liaise with planning authorities and regulatory agencies.
	Ensure compliance with Nigerian Building Code, planning regulations, fire safety requirements, accessibility standards, and environmental regulations.


Client &amp; Stakeholder Management:


	Present design concepts confidently to clients and executive leadership.
	Build trusted relationships with clients, consultants, contractors, and external stakeholders.
	Provide professional architectural advice throughout project execution.
	Manage client expectations while maintaining design integrity.


Quality Assurance:


	Ensure all architectural deliverables meet Cloreto Group&#39;s quality standards.
	Conduct design reviews to minimize errors and rework.
	Champion continuous improvement in architectural processes and documentation standards.


Innovation &amp; Sustainability:


	Stay updated on emerging architectural trends, construction technologies, sustainable materials, and digital design tools.
	Recommend innovative solutions that improve project quality, operational efficiency, and environmental performance.
	Promote sustainable and cost-effective design practices across all projects.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Architecture.
	3&ndash;5 years of relevant experience.
	Proficiency in AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp, Lumion, ArchiCAD or related software.
	Strong understanding of building regulations and construction detailing.
	Strong presentation and communication skills.


Preferred Attributes:


	Creativity balanced with practicality
	High digital literacy
	Problem-solving ability
	Time management


Salary
N350,000 - N450,000 Monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: jodazenintegratedservices@gmail.com using &quot;Architect&quot; as the subject of the email.&nbsp;",

Architect Job at Jodazen Integrated Services




        
    

        
        Jodazen Integrated Services - Our client is a dynamic and fast-growing organisation operating across the real estate sector.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:  Architect
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time 

Job Overview
     

            
    




	We are seeking a smart and detail-oriented architect.
	The architect will support the design and execution of residential, commercial, and mixed-use developments.
	We require a highly competent, IT-savvy professional who combines strong design thinking with modern digital workflow capabilities.


Key Responsibilities
Design & Project Development:


	Lead architectural design from concept development through construction documentation.
	Develop innovative, functional, and aesthetically compelling architectural solutions.
	Prepare detailed architectural drawings, presentations, renderings, and design reports.
	Translate client requirements into practical and buildable design solutions.
	Ensure designs align with project budgets, timelines, regulatory requirements, and sustainability objectives.


Technical Coordination:


	Coordinate closely with structural, mechanical, electrical, and civil engineers.
	Review engineering drawings to ensure multidisciplinary coordination.
	Resolve design conflicts before construction begins.
	Conduct constructability reviews to improve efficiency and reduce project risks.


Project Delivery:


	Provide architectural leadership throughout the construction lifecycle.
	Conduct regular site inspections to ensure work complies with approved drawings and specifications.
	Respond promptly to RFIs (Requests for Information), design clarifications, and site challenges.
	Review contractor shop drawings, material samples, and technical submissions.
	Participate in project meetings and provide design guidance to project teams.


Regulatory Compliance:


	Prepare and submit documentation required for planning approvals and statutory permits.
	Liaise with planning authorities and regulatory agencies.
	Ensure compliance with Nigerian Building Code, planning regulations, fire safety requirements, accessibility standards, and environmental regulations.


Client & Stakeholder Management:


	Present design concepts confidently to clients and executive leadership.
	Build trusted relationships with clients, consultants, contractors, and external stakeholders.
	Provide professional architectural advice throughout project execution.
	Manage client expectations while maintaining design integrity.


Quality Assurance:


	Ensure all architectural deliverables meet Cloreto Group's quality standards.
	Conduct design reviews to minimize errors and rework.
	Champion continuous improvement in architectural processes and documentation standards.


Innovation & Sustainability:


	Stay updated on emerging architectural trends, construction technologies, sustainable materials, and digital design tools.
	Recommend innovative solutions that improve project quality, operational efficiency, and environmental performance.
	Promote sustainable and cost-effective design practices across all projects.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor's Degree in Architecture.
	3–5 years of relevant experience.
	Proficiency in AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp, Lumion, ArchiCAD or related software.
	Strong understanding of building regulations and construction detailing.
	Strong presentation and communication skills.


Preferred Attributes:


	Creativity balanced with practicality
	High digital literacy
	Problem-solving ability
	Time management


Salary
N350,000 - N450,000 Monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Architect" as the subject of the email.     

    

        Click here to Apply
